title: Fingerfin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fingerfins''' were fish from [[Ruan]] mashed and used as fertilizer additives.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
